configuration:
%d{HH:mm:ss} %-5level [%logger{20}] - %msg%n
logs/profiler.log
logs/profiler-%d{yyyy-MM-dd}.%i.log 10MB 7
%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} %-5level [%logger{36}] - %msg%n
-- Configure log level out of DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR -- prints in console output -- prints in log file -- Configure log level at run time using: java -Dlogging.level.org.openmetadata=DEBUG -jar app.jar
